review_notes: Silhouette gate asset: standing (frame 0) + seated_listen (frame 1), every body pixel soot_0. Card feature check: shortest standing height of the two packages produced so far (80px vs arkady's 90px, same foot line), visibly stooped comma-shape (head/neck curve forward from the torso in both poses, never straightens), round head silhouette with a distinct occiput bump (ear) and glasses-notch readable even as pure silhouette, wide compact rectangular torso vs arkady's narrow vertical stroke. Composited against char_arkady_silhouette_v002 (only other package produced at this point): clearly distinguishable by height, posture, head shape, and torso proportion. Full six-way check to be re-run once nikolai/sasha/galina/gennady exist.
